title: pinus nigra var. maritima
intro: Pinus nigra var. maritima, also known as Maritime Black Pine, is a variety of evergreen tree that is native to the Mediterranean region. The Maritime Black Pine has been used for centuries in traditional medicine, where its leaves, bark, and resin are valued for their medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues and inflammation. The plant's essential oils and terpenes have been found to have antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties, which contribute to its potential health benefits, including reducing stress, improving immune function, and protecting against oxidative damage. Maritime Black Pine is often used in herbal preparations such as essential oils, tinctures, and infusions, and can be consumed as a tea or applied topically to the skin.
